title: 10 best herbal essential oils for hormonal imbalance
intro_desc: Herbal essential oils for hormonal imbalance are a natural and effective way to restore balance to the body's hormonal system. These oils, derived from plants, interact with the body's endocrine system to regulate hormone production and reduce symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances such as PMS, menopause, and thyroid issues. Clary sage oil, for example, has been shown to alleviate menstrual cramps and mood swings, while lavender oil helps to reduce anxiety and stress. By incorporating these oils into daily routines, individuals can experience improved energy levels, reduced hot flashes, and enhanced overall well-being.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Angelica essential oils helps with hormonal imbalance because it contains bioactive compounds that have a regulating effect on the endocrine system. The oil's estrogen-like properties can help to balance out the body's hormonal fluctuations, alleviating symptoms such as PMS and menopause-related hot flashes. Additionally, angelica oil has been shown to stimulate the thyroid gland, supporting the production of hormones that regulate metabolism and energy levels. By promoting hormonal equilibrium, angelica essential oils can help to reduce stress and anxiety, leading to a more balanced and healthy physiological state.
remedy_properties: Adapogenic properties: Angelica oil helps regulate hormonal balance by adapting to the body's unique needs, reducing stress and anxiety that can contribute to hormonal imbalances.

Estrogenic properties: Angelica oil contains estrogen-like compounds that help alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings, by supporting the body's natural estrogen production.

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties: Angelica oil's antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances and related symptoms like fatigue, brain fog, and mood disturbances.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in sesquiterpenes, which help to balance and regulate hormonal activity.
Rhyzomes: Contain angelic acid, a potent anti-inflammatory compound that helps to reduce inflammation and promote hormone balance.
remedy_recipe: Harvest angelica archangelica roots and leaves in early morning dew for maximum potency.
Dry the plant material in shade or air circulation for seven days to reduce moisture content.
Steam distill dried angelica archangelica roots and leaves using a clevenger apparatus at 100°c for two hours.
Separate the essential oil from the distillation residue by decanting it into a dark glass bottle.
Store the final product in a cool, dark place to preserve its bioactive compounds and aroma for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sage essential oils helps with hormonal imbalance because it has a profound effect on the endocrine system. The oil's active compounds, such as camphor and linalool, have been shown to regulate estrogen levels and reduce inflammation in the body, which can help alleviate symptoms of PMS and menopause. Additionally, sage oil's adaptogenic properties allow it to support the adrenal glands, promoting balance and harmony throughout the hormonal system, leading to improved overall health and well-being.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Sage essential oil's antioxidant properties help neutralize free radicals that can disrupt hormone production and lead to imbalances, promoting a healthy hormonal environment.

Adaptogenic Properties: Sage essential oil's adaptogenic properties help the body adapt to stress and balance cortisol levels, which is important for regulating hormones such as estrogen and progesterone.

Hormone Regulating Compounds: Sage essential oil contains compounds like thujone, camphor, and bornyl acetate that have been shown to regulate hormone production, particularly in the adrenal glands, helping to balance hormonal imbalances.
remedy_parts: Roots: Sage roots have a grounding and balancing effect on hormones, making them ideal for calming anxiety and stress associated with hormonal imbalances.
Flowers: The flowers of the sage plant contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which help regulate estrogen levels and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh salvia officinalis leaves from your garden or a trusted supplier measuring 100g of plant material.
Dry the harvested leaves in a warm and well-ventilated area for 7-10 days or using a food dehydrator on low heat for 4 hours.
Crush the dried leaves into small pieces to increase surface area for steam distillation using mortar and pestle or coffee grinder processing 100g of dried material at once.
Set up your steam distillation apparatus with 500ml of distilled water and add the crushed salvia officinalis material to the distillation chamber processing for 2-3 hours.
Filter the resulting essential oil from the distillate using a paper coffee filter or glass wool and store it in a dark glass bottle with a tight-fitting lid at room temperature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chaste tree essential oils helps with hormonal imbalance because it contains a unique compound called casticin, which has been shown to regulate hormones in the body. The oil works by stimulating the pituitary gland, which produces hormones that help balance estrogen and progesterone levels. This natural regulation can help alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances, such as PMS, hot flashes, and mood swings. Additionally, chaste tree essential oil has been used traditionally to support women's health and fertility.
remedy_properties: Pregnenolone: This property helps regulate hormone production, particularly cortisol and estrogen levels, which can alleviate symptoms of PMS, menopause, and polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS).
Anti-inflammatory effects: By reducing inflammation in the body, chaste tree essential oil may help mitigate hormonal imbalances caused by chronic inflammation, such as endometriosis and fibroids.
Antioxidant properties: Chaste tree essential oil's antioxidant properties can help protect the body from free radical damage, which can contribute to hormone imbalance and related health issues.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the chaste tree plant are used to create essential oils that help regulate hormonal imbalances, particularly in women, by acting as a natural hormone balancer.

Flowers: Chaste tree flowers are rich in flavonoids and iridoids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalance, such as mood swings and hot flashes.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh vitex agnus castus leaves and stems, ensuring proper identification and handling to avoid contamination.
Dry the harvested plant material using shade drying or air circulation for at least seven days to reduce moisture levels.
Steam distill the dried plant material using a 10-15% ratio of plant material to distilled water for 4-5 hours to extract essential oils.
Collect and filter the essential oil using a coalescer or decanter, ensuring clear appearance and minimal particulate matter.
Store the extracted essential oil in dark glass bottles with tight-fitting lids, keeping it away from heat and light sources for optimal preservation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sage essential oils helps with hormonal imbalance because of its natural ability to regulate estrogen levels, promoting a balance between progesterone and testosterone hormones. The oil contains compounds like camphor, bornyl acetate, and alpha-pinene that have been shown to reduce the production of cortisol, a hormone linked to hormonal imbalances. Additionally, sage essential oils' anti-inflammatory properties help alleviate symptoms such as PMS cramps, mood swings, and hot flashes associated with hormonal imbalance, leading to a more balanced and harmonious endocrine system.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant: Sage essential oil has antioxidant properties that help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances by protecting hormones from damage and promoting a healthy balance in the body.

Uterotonic: Sage essential oil has been shown to have uterotonic effects, meaning it can help regulate menstrual flow, alleviate cramps, and normalize uterine contractions, which can be beneficial for women experiencing hormonal imbalances related to menstruation or menopause.

Adaptogenic: Sage essential oil is an adaptogen, which means it helps the body adapt to stress and promotes balance in the endocrine system, including the regulation of hormones such as cortisol, estrogen, and progesterone.
remedy_parts: Roots: Sage roots are valued for their adaptogenic properties, helping to balance hormones and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
Barks: The barks of the sage plant contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to regulate hormonal activity and reduce inflammation.
Seeds: Sage seeds are a rich source of omega-3 fatty acids, which help to support hormone production and balance.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh salvia sclarea leaves in morning dew for optimal potency and aroma retention.
Dry the harvested leaves using a food dehydrator at 35 degrees celsius for 6 hours.
Blend 50 grams of dried salvia sclarea leaves with 500 milliliters of carrier oil such as sweet almond or jojoba oil.
Steam distill the blended mixture in a stainless steel still for 2-3 hours to extract essential oils.
Filter and store the resulting essential oil in dark glass bottles at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: English lavender essential oils helps with hormonal imbalance because of its calming and balancing properties, which can help regulate the body's endocrine system. The oil contains linalool and linalyl acetate, two compounds that have been shown to reduce stress and anxiety, both major contributors to hormonal imbalances. By promoting relaxation and reducing cortisol levels, English lavender essential oils may help alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal fluctuations, such as mood swings, insomnia, and hot flashes.
remedy_properties: Estrogen-regulating properties: English Lavender oil has been shown to regulate estrogen levels, which can help alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalances such as mood swings, bloating, and hot flashes.

Adrenal cortex-stimulating properties: English Lavender oil can stimulate the adrenal cortex, helping to reduce stress and anxiety that can exacerbate hormonal imbalances, while also supporting the body's natural production of hormones.

Antioxidant properties: English Lavender oil's antioxidant properties help to neutralize free radicals that can damage hormone-producing cells and disrupt hormonal balance, promoting overall endocrine health.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of English lavender contain a high concentration of sesquiterpenes, which have been shown to help regulate hormonal balance and alleviate symptoms of PMS.
Flowers: Lavender flowers are rich in linalool and linalyl acetate, compounds that have a calming effect on the body and can help reduce stress and anxiety related to hormonal imbalance.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh lavender flowers and leaves from mature plants for optimal potency.
Dry the harvested botanicals using a low-temperature dehydration method within hours.
Steam distill the dried lavender material in a 12:1 ratio with distilled water at 100°c for 4 hours.
Collect and filter the resulting essential oil through a paper filter to remove impurities immediately.
Store the final product in dark glass bottles at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Black locust essential oils helps with hormonal imbalance because of its unique composition, which includes estrogen-balancing compounds like flavonoids and saponins. These natural ingredients have been shown to gently regulate estrogen levels, reducing symptoms associated with PMS, menopause, and polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS). By promoting a healthy balance of hormones, black locust essential oils can also alleviate issues like mood swings, fatigue, and irregular periods. Its potent antioxidant properties further support the body's natural hormonal rhythms, leading to a more harmonious endocrine system.
remedy_properties: Estrogenic activity: The isoflavones present in black locust bark have been shown to exhibit estrogenic effects, which could potentially help alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances such as hot flashes and mood swings.

Antioxidant properties: Black locust bark has antioxidant properties that may help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation caused by hormonal imbalances, promoting a healthy balance of hormone production and reducing the risk of chronic diseases.

Anti-inflammatory activity: The saponins present in black locust bark have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory effects, which could help alleviate symptoms such as breast tenderness, mood swings, and other discomforts associated with hormonal imbalances.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in triterpenoid saponins, black locust roots have been traditionally used to treat hormone-related issues such as menopausal symptoms and endometriosis.
Seeds: Black locust seeds contain a unique compound called glyasperin A, which has been shown to exhibit estrogenic properties and may help alleviate hormonal imbalances.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh robinia pseudoacacia leaves and flowers in the morning when they are at their peak potency.
Dry the plant material using a food dehydrator or oven on low heat for 24 hours.
Steam distill the dried robinia pseudoacacia plant material using a still or essential oil extractor for 4-6 hours.
Filter the resulting essential oil using activated charcoal and store it in a dark glass bottle with a tight-fitting lid at room temperature.
Allow the essential oil to mature for 2 weeks before using it, shaking the bottle daily to facilitate blending and stabilization.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Fennel essential oils helps with hormonal imbalance because it has a direct impact on the body's endocrine system. The oil contains estrogens, which help to balance out the levels of estrogen and progesterone in the body, promoting a healthy menstrual cycle and reducing symptoms of PMS such as bloating, cramps, and mood swings. Additionally, fennel oil stimulates the thyroid gland, regulating metabolism and energy levels, further supporting overall hormonal balance. This makes it an excellent natural remedy for women dealing with hormonal imbalances.
remedy_properties: Estrogenic properties: Fennel essential oil contains estrogen-like compounds that can help balance estrogen levels, which can be disrupted by factors such as birth control pills, environmental toxins, and menopause.
Adrenal cortex stimulant: Fennel essential oil has been shown to stimulate the adrenal cortex, which can help regulate cortisol production and reduce stress-induced hormonal imbalances.

Antioxidant properties: Fennel essential oil's antioxidant properties can help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to hormonal imbalance and related symptoms such as PMS, menopause symptoms, and polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS).
remedy_parts: Roots: Fennel roots are rich in estrogenic compounds, making them effective in regulating hormonal imbalances and alleviating symptoms of menopause.
Seeds: Fennel seeds contain a high concentration of estragole, an antioxidant that helps to normalize hormonal production and reduce symptoms of PMS.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality foeniculum vulgare leaves and flowers in late summer or early fall, weighing about 1 pound.
Dry the harvested plant material using a dehydrator or air-drying method for at least 48 hours, maintaining temperature below 105°f.
Steam-distill the dried foeniculum vulgare material using a traditional still or a modern distillation apparatus with a steam generator, operating at 140-170°f pressure.
Collect and filter the resulting essential oil through a glass wool pad or coffee filter paper into dark glass bottles within 24 hours of distillation, storing them in a cool, dry place.
Age the foeniculum vulgare essential oil for a minimum of 2 weeks before use, allowing its constituents to stabilize and mature for optimal therapeutic benefits.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Bitter orange essential oils helps with hormonal imbalance because of its ability to regulate the body's endocrine system. The oil contains flavonoids, which have been shown to modulate the activity of estrogen receptors, promoting balance and reducing inflammation in the body. Additionally, bitter orange essential oil has a calming effect on the nervous system, helping to reduce stress and anxiety that can contribute to hormonal imbalances. By addressing these underlying factors, bitter orange essential oil can help to promote a more balanced hormonal environment.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant: Citral's antioxidant activity helps reduce oxidative stress, which can contribute to hormonal imbalance by damaging cells and disrupting normal cellular function.

Anti-inflammatory: Citral's anti-inflammatory properties may help alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalance, such as breast tenderness and mood swings, by reducing inflammation in the body.
Uterotropic: In animal studies, citral has been shown to exhibit uterotropic effects, which means it can stimulate the uterus and potentially help regulate menstrual cycles.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, bitter orange roots are used to create essential oils that help regulate hormones and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
Seeds: Containing a high concentration of flavonoids and limonoids, bitter orange seeds are prized for their ability to support hormonal balance and reduce symptoms of PMS.
remedy_recipe: Gather high-quality dried citrus x aurantium peel and organic carrier oil such as sweet almond oil or jojoba oil in sufficient quantities for processing.
Combine one part dried citrus aurantium peel with three parts carrier oil in a clean glass jar, ensuring the herbs are fully covered by the oil.
Allow the mixture to macerate at room temperature for 14 days, shaking the jar daily to promote extraction of essential oils and resins.
After the maceration period, strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into another clean glass container, pressing on the solids to extract as much oil as possible from the herbs.
Store the resulting herbal citrus x aurantium essential oil in dark glass bottles with tight-fitting lids at room temperature for up to six months, shaking well before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ceylon cinnamon essential oils helps with hormonal imbalance because of its ability to regulate insulin levels and blood sugar control. The oil's active compound, cinnamaldehyde, has been shown to stimulate the production of insulin, which helps to balance hormones like cortisol, estrogen, and testosterone. Additionally, Ceylon cinnamon's anti-inflammatory properties help to soothe the body and reduce stress, a common contributor to hormonal imbalance. By promoting healthy insulin function and reducing inflammation, Ceylon cinnamon essential oils can support overall hormone regulation and balance.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Ceylon cinnamon essential oil's antioxidant properties help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances by protecting hormones from damage and promoting a healthy balance of estrogen and progesterone.

Anti-Inflammatory Properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in Ceylon cinnamon essential oil, such as cinnamaldehyde, can help to reduce inflammation in the body, which is often associated with hormonal imbalances and conditions like polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS).

Adaptogenic Properties: Ceylon cinnamon essential oil's adaptogenic properties allow it to help regulate hormonal fluctuations by reducing stress and promoting a sense of balance and harmony in the body, which can be especially beneficial for women experiencing hormonal imbalances during menopause or premenstrual syndrome (PMS).
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in phytochemicals that help regulate hormone production and balance estrogen levels.
Barks: Contains lignans and other bioactive compounds that aid in reducing cortisol levels and promoting relaxation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh cinnamomum verum leaves in the early morning after dew has evaporated for maximum potency.
Wash the harvested leaves thoroughly with lukewarm water and mild soap to remove any dirt or debris.
Steam distill 100g of cleaned leaves in a 500ml distillation apparatus using 300ml of deionized water at 100°c for 4 hours.
Collect the essential oil produced during distillation, which should yield approximately 2-3% of the original leaf material's weight.
Store the extracted essential oil in a dark glass bottle with a tight-fitting lid, away from direct sunlight and heat sources, for up to 12 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon balm essential oils helps with hormonal imbalance because of its natural ability to regulate and soothe the endocrine system. Its calming properties help reduce stress, anxiety, and inflammation, which can disrupt hormone production and balance. The oil's mild sedative effects also promote relaxation, allowing the body to better respond to hormonal fluctuations. Additionally, lemon balm essential oils have been shown to increase estrogen levels in women, helping to alleviate symptoms of menopause and PMS, such as hot flashes and mood swings.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Lemon balm essential oil's antioxidant properties help neutralize free radicals, which can contribute to hormonal imbalance and other chronic diseases, by protecting cells from damage caused by oxidative stress.

Adaptogenic properties: Lemon balm essential oil is adaptogenic, meaning it helps the body adapt to stress, which is a common cause of hormonal imbalance, by regulating cortisol levels and promoting relaxation and balance in the body.

Phytoestrogenic properties: Lemon balm essential oil contains phytoestrogens, which are plant-based compounds that can help regulate estrogen levels in the body, alleviating symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances such as menopause and PMS.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the lemon balm plant contain a high concentration of sesquiterpenes, which can help balance hormone levels and reduce stress-related symptoms.
Flowers: Lemon balm flowers are rich in citral, a compound that has been shown to alleviate PMS symptoms and regulate hormonal imbalances.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality melissa officinalis leaves at dawn when they are most potent containing 15 grams of fresh leaves per 100ml.
Cleanse the harvested leaves by gently rinsing them in filtered water for 3 minutes to remove impurities.
Steam distill the cleaned leaves using a clevenger apparatus with a temperature range of 80-90°c and a distillation time of 4 hours.
Monitor the essential oil yield and color during the distillation process ensuring a yellowish-green liquid is produced containing 15-20% essential oils.
Bottle the freshly distilled essential oil in dark glass containers and store it in a cool dry place away from direct sunlight for up to 6 months.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat hormonal imbalance with herbal essential oils is to incorporate a blend of calming and regulating oils into your daily routine. Clary sage and bergamot promote relaxation and reduce anxiety, while lavender and ylang-ylang help to balance hormones. Use them in a diffuser or apply topically with a carrier oil to reap their benefits. Regular use can alleviate symptoms such as mood swings and hot flashes.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to hormonal imbalance that are treated with herbal essential oils are stress, anxiety, and mood disorders. For example, bergamot oil is used to alleviate symptoms of depression, while lavender oil helps reduce anxiety and promote relaxation. Geranium oil can help regulate menstrual cycles and ease PMS symptoms, making it a natural alternative for women's health issues.
